film.title: Chad Hanna
film.overview: Country boy joins a circus in the 1840s and falls in love with the bare-back rider. Later he falls in love with another circus runaway.

dialogues.dialogue: I wanted to BE somebody.  Somebody worth being.  And I was so proud to marry you.  I just couldn't find the words to tell you.  But from the very minute Chad

I've tried to do everything exactly like I thought you wanted me to do... For some reason, I haven't been able to do it.  For some reason, I haven't been able to do it.  I haven't been able to make you proud at all.  I just make you sour.  You're crazy.
If I had a wife.  What'd you say your name was?  Proudfoot...Elmer Proudfoot  Why, I'm pleased to meet you Mr Proudfoot.  Hanna's my name.
What'd you say your name was?  Proudfoot...Elmer Proudfoot  Why, I'm pleased to meet you Mr Proudfoot.  Hanna's my name.  Glad to know you, Mr Hanna.
Hanna's my name.  Glad to know you, Mr Hanna.  Sit down, Mr Proudfoot... sit right down.  Thank you.  Let's you and me have a nice quiet little talk.
